exercises.title: Linear Code Implementation
exercises.description: Implement a complete linear code class with encoding and syndrome computation.
tasks: Create LinearCode class from generator matrix G
Compute parity check matrix H from G
Implement syndrome computation s = H × r^T
hints: For systematic G = [I | P], then H = [P^T | I]

exercises.title: Codeword Enumeration
exercises.description: Generate and analyze all codewords of a linear code.
tasks: Encode each to get all codewords
hints: Check: c1 ⊕ c2 in codewords for all pairs
Min distance = min weight of non-zero codewords (for linear codes)

exercises.title: Dual Code Calculator
tasks: Compute dual code C⊥ from original C
hints: G of C becomes H of C⊥
Verify on repetition and Hamming codes

exercises.title: CSS Code Validator
exercises.description: Check if codes can be used for CSS quantum code construction.
tasks: Calculate quantum code parameters [[n, k, d]]
Analyze Hamming code for Steane construction
Report which classical codes yield valid quantum codes
hints: C₂⊥ ⊆ C₁ means rows of H₂ are codewords of C₁
For symmetric: single code with G × G^T = 0
